modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to open encrypted email attachment in Outlook.

full_description_text: The user is experiencing difficulty accessing an encrypted document received via email. This issue arises while using Outlook with Trend Micro encryption and Cisco Encrypted services. The user requires assistance to open the attachment successfully.
short_description: Unable to open encrypted email attachment in Outlook.
description: The user is experiencing difficulty accessing an encrypted document received via email. This issue arises while using Outlook with Trend Micro encryption and Cisco Encrypted services. The user requires assistance to open the attachment successfully.
